cluster_plan.label: Creator Growth Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring content growth, repurposing, hook iteration, audience analytics, and monetization loops for creators.

cluster_plan.label: Gaming / NPC / Community Worlds
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring gaming, NPC, modding, streamer, and community-management loops with strong social spread potential.

cluster_plan.label: AI Agent Builders
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring agent building, orchestration, eval, workflow automation, and tool-composition loops for AI builders.

cluster_plan.label: Startup Builder Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring startup formation, validation, fundraising, GTM, and founder decision loops that people talk about and share.

cluster_plan.label: Builder Productivity Systems
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring shipping, planning, coordination, focus, and execution loops for builders and power users.

cluster_plan.label: Career / Status / Social Proof
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring hiring, reputation, resume, interview, portfolio, and social-proof loops that spread through peer comparison.

cluster_plan.label: Consumer Agent Utilities
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring life-admin, local decision, shopping, travel, and personal coordination loops with obvious shareability.

cluster_plan.label: Crypto / DeFi / Trading
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring crypto trading, onchain research, portfolio ops, DeFi strategy, and token intelligence loops.

cluster_plan.label: X-Native Persona Tools
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring X-native posting, idea capture, reply games, clout loops, and identity-building tools for public builders.

cluster_plan.label: Design / Remix / Aesthetics
cluster_plan.focus: Recurring design remixing, aesthetic iteration, visual identity, and style-transfer loops people show off and share.

cluster_packets.focus: Recurring content growth, repurposing, hook iteration, audience analytics, and monetization loops for creators.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Creator Growth Systems. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring content growth, repurposing, hook iteration, audience analytics, and monetization loops for creators.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

next_actions: Collect 1-3 concrete candidates from each assigned agent.
Reject vague workflows, personas, and generic tooling before canonicalization.
Merge the completed cluster packets back into one filled discovery-program packet.
